name: claude-docs-creator
description: Toolkit for authoring, validating, and maintaining .claude/ documentation in any project. Bundles skills for /init-project, /create-docs, /update-docs, /validate-claude-docs, /status, /analyze-frontend, /create-mermaid, /research, /create-steps, /create-tutorial, a fleet of specialist subagents (module-documenter, frontend-detector, tech-stack-profiler, design-system-scanner, component-inventory, data-flow-mapper, architecture-analyzer), and governance rules for docs-folder-structure, toolkit-workflow, and report-format.
